display.purpose: Page and hero headings — Space Grotesk 600, tight tracking.

headline.purpose: Page titles and the control-room header.

title.purpose: Lane headings, card names, modal titles.

body.purpose: All UI text and reading — Hanken Grotesk, 14px base.

label.purpose: UPPERCASE letter-spaced metadata — IDs, status, paths, counts.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Visible focus halo on inputs and keyboard focus.

motion.name: dur-base
motion.purpose: Modal fade and rise, default transitions.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing — quick out, gentle settle. No bounce.

breakpoints.name: agrid-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: Two-up agent grid collapses to a single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one primary action per surface — launch, confirm, send.
components.css: .ds-btn { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1; border-radius: var(--r-md); padding: 9px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; white-space: nowrap; transition: background var(--dur-fast), border-color var(--dur-fast), transform var(--dur-fast); } .ds-btn:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--blue-500); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.12) inset; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--blue-600); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); }

components.name: Energy Button
components.description: The approve / 'needs you' moment. Clay-orange, used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-energy { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1; border-radius: var(--r-md); padding: 9px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--orange-500); color: var(--fg-on-accent); transition: background var(--dur-fast), transform var(--dur-fast); } .ds-btn-energy:hover { background: var(--orange-600); } .ds-btn-energy:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-energy:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--glow-orange); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary, low-emphasis action — a hairline border, fills faintly on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1; border-radius: var(--r-md); padding: 9px 16px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--fg-2); border: 1px solid var(--line-default); transition: background var(--dur-fast), color var(--dur-fast); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.05); color: var(--fg-1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: A labeled field — mono UPPERCASE label above, translucent fill, blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .07em; color: var(--fg-3); } .ds-input { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--fg-1); background: rgba(56,65,85,.35); border: 1px solid var(--line-default); border-radius: var(--r-md); padding: 11px 13px; outline: none; width: 100%; transition: border-color var(--dur-fast), box-shadow var(--dur-fast); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--fg-4); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--blue-500); box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); }

components.name: Agent Card
components.description: A raised surface representing one agent's mission — name, callsign, task, mono telemetry footer. State shown by inset line/glow, not a color flood.
components.html:
OrbiterAC-204
In flight

Refactoring the auth module. Nothing needs you right now.

main4m 12s
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--space-750); border: 1px solid var(--line-subtle); border-radius: var(--r-lg); padding: 16px 17px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(61,123,255,.16); transition: border-color var(--dur-fast), background var(--dur-fast); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: var(--line-default); background: var(--space-700); } .ds-card-top { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 11px; } .ds-card-who { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-card-nm { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: var(--fg-1); line-height: 1.1; } .ds-card-id { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; color: var(--fg-3); letter-spacing: .04em; } .ds-card-task { font-size: 13px; color: var(--fg-2); line-height: 1.45; margin: 0; } .ds-card-task b { color: var(--fg-1); font-weight: 600; } .ds-card-foot { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 13px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; color: var(--fg-3); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin-left: auto; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: A mono UPPERCASE pill on a status tint, leading a status dot. Color is always paired with a word.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: var(--r-full); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; flex: none; } .ds-badge-active { background: var(--blue-tint); color: var(--blue-300); } .ds-dot-active { background: var(--blue-500); } .ds-badge-review { background: var(--orange-tint); color: var(--orange-300); } .ds-dot-review { background: var(--orange-500); } .ds-badge-nominal { background: var(--nominal-tint); color: #6fe0a6; }

narrative.overview: Agent Desktop looks like trustworthy instrumentation in a dimly-lit operations room. Surfaces are near-black with a faint cool tint, and depth is built almost entirely from surface lightness plus hairline borders, not from heavy shadow. The operator is supervising six agents at once across hours-long sessions; the interface stays quiet so the one thing that needs attention can speak with a single warm accent. The system rejects the generic SaaS dashboard, glassmorphism as a theme, and the neon-on-dark hacker-terminal cosplay. The aerospace metaphor is seasoning, never costume.
keyCharacteristics: Deep-space dark theme; near-black #0d1017 app background with a cool tint.
Depth from tonal layering + hairlines, not drop shadows.
Blue is structure; clay-orange is 'needs you' and appears rarely.
Three type roles — geometric display, humanist body, mono telemetry.
Mono UPPERCASE micro-labels are a brand signature.
Motion and glow are reserved for state, never ornament.

rules.name: The Signal-Flare Rule
rules.body: Clay-orange covers a tiny fraction of any screen and only ever means 'this needs you' or 'this is live.' Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Derive-Don't-Invent Rule
rules.body: When a new hue is needed, derive it in OKLCH from the existing ramps with a readability floor on dark surfaces. Never hand-pick a new hex.

rules.name: The Mono-Label Rule
rules.body: Short metadata — section headers, status, callsigns, paths, counts — is set in JetBrains Mono, UPPERCASE, letter-spaced. Everywhere else is sentence case.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Buttons, menus, and headers are sentence case ('Launch mission', never 'Launch Mission'). The mono label is the only exception.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; elevation comes from a lighter tonal step and a hairline. A drop shadow is a response to floating; a glow is a response to state. Never decoration.

dos: Do reference the tokens in src/lib/styles/tokens.css for every color, space, radius, and duration.
Do build depth from tonal surface steps and hairlines.
Do keep clay-orange to a tiny fraction of the screen, meaning only 'needs you' or 'live'.
Do set labels, IDs, paths, timestamps, and numbers in JetBrains Mono, UPPERCASE and letter-spaced for labels, tabular-nums for numbers.
Do show every status with an icon/label/shape alongside its color, and keep body text at WCAG AA contrast on its surface.
Do make focus always visible with --focus-ring, and provide a reduced-motion path: drop the pulses, show end-states.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard — no hero-metric template, no identical icon-card grids, no gradient washes.
Don't use glassmorphism as a theme; blur is for sticky bars and modal scrims only.
Don't drift toward neon-on-dark 'hacker terminal' — the deep-space theme is calm and inviting.
Don't flood a card with status color; express state with a 1px inset line, a glow, or a tint, plus a badge.
Don't put a drop shadow on a resting surface, use pill radii outside dots/avatars/toggles, or use border-left/right >1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't invent a new hex; derive new hues in OKLCH from the existing ramps.
Don't title-case buttons, use emoji in product UI, or write fake aerospace countdowns.
